description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure with a broad chest and defined arms, standing with arms extended horizontally. He is shirtless, revealing a well-built torso and a full beard, and wears camouflage-patterned pants with reinforced knee pads. His lower legs are covered by black tactical boots, and his hands are large and open. The figure's facial features are stern, with a closely cropped hairstyle and a strong jawline. The overall appearance suggests a military or security background, with attire suited for rugged urban or outdoor environments. The figure's posture and build convey strength and readiness.
description: A muscular, shirtless adult male with a beard, wearing camouflage pants, knee pads, and tactical boots, arms extended outward. The figure has a strong, imposing build and a military-inspired appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the muscular chest, facial features, and full extension of both arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, beard, and the definition of the arm and torso.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the broad back, arm musculature, and the back of the pants and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and side of the pants and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: military-style camouflage pants with reinforced knee pads and tactical boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: short cropped hair with full beard
